zh.lifeSummary: Margery Everard於大約1594年出生在英國。她於大約1619年與Robert Rose Sr在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1664年6月7日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文布藍福德，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文西摩從雷加納爾 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margery Everard于大约1594年出生在英国。她于大约1619年与Robert Rose Sr在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1664年6月7日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文布藍福德，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文西摩從雷加納爾 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Everard was born about 1594, in England. She married Robert Rose Sr about 1619, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died before 7 June 1664, in Branford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Congregational Church Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Everardは約1594年にイギリスで生まれた。約1619年にイギリスでRobert Rose Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1664年6月7日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンブランフォードで死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンセイモウルコングレガティオナル チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Everard(은)는 대략 1594년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1619년 영국에서 Robert Rose Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 6월 7일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 브랜퍼드에서 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 세이모우르 콘그레가티오널 처르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery Everard nasceu aproximadamente 1594, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Robert Rose Sr aproximadamente 1619, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 7 de junho de 1664, em Branford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Congregational Church Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery Everard родилась около 1594 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Rose Sr около 1619 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед 7 июнь 1664 г. в местности бранфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности конгрегатиональ чурч кеметири, симоур, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Margery Everard nació aproximadamente 1594, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Robert Rose Sr aproximadamente 1619, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 7 de junio de 1664, en Branford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Congregational Church Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
